title: Boao 6 Pieces Mini Spatula, Multicolor Makeup Spatula, Small Tiny Spatula for Cosmetics and Kitchen Jar Food Bottle, 3 Sizes(Pastel Colors)
description:
About this item
No more waste: the silicone spatula features enough long body and narrow head to get all the content out of your container item, which means no more wasted product
Safe material: the makeup silicone spatula is made of a strong and elastic material, the head has the right flexibility to easily bypass the curves and corners of the container, so it works for most containers
Versatile application: the makeup spatulas can also be applied for cosmetics, hand body lotion, lip gloss, nail polish, foods like mustard jar, butter, ketchup and countless other every day items
Easy to clean: one-piece seamless design keep it sturdy without break case and easy to clean, save your energy and time, bring convenience for you life
What you'll get: 1 set including 6 pieces silicone spatula in 6 different colors, 2 x large spatula (12 inch, 2 x medium spatula (9 inch), 2 x small spatula (6 inch), different sizes and various colors to meet your different needs
reviews_5s:
I bought these for my future daughter n law
and she liked so much, purchased the same
for myself. These little spatulas are perfect for getting the last little bit of expensive make up out of bottles which you cannot get the last 1-2 uses out of contents. These spatulas will come in handy for many things in the kitchen as well.. Have never considered there are spatulas this small (& long). They’re sturdy, but pliable. Good quality.Great for when you need a small spatula to get all the remaining in a jar. Makes life easier.I purchased this to reach the bottom of my lotion bottles. I am thrilled at the quality and effectiveness of the great little reaching spatulas. I couldn't be happierThese are perfect to scrap every little bit out of jars. I was amazed how much was left in the jar before we used it.No more waste of expensive products! Getting the last drop when these tiny spatulas are used.I bought several packages gave several of these spatulas to my friends and family over the holidays. Each packet has two sets. Ladies really like the smallest spatula to get down into make up foundation bottles and other small containers to reach every last drop.Love these, good for getting the last drop of Nutella etc and also good for cosmeticsThey work great and are dishwasher safe. I wanted to buy Spatty Daddys but I like the one-piece design of these better.Different sizes for different jobs!Love the great storage tube to hold the small spatulas. Useful sizes to help get the last bit of money’s worth
out of my cosmetics
reviews_1s:
Can't evaluate these for makeup use. But they are no good for kitchen. Way too weak; food moves them, they don't move food.
Don't put them in the dishwasher. They fall thru the silverware rack and get bent/ broken. So 'easy to clean' is a definite NO.I returned these because they were so cheap. You could see the stick inside the rubber. These will definitely tear and rip.
